description: Perfect for those casual days, this colour block boot is an indulgence every man must incorporate in his wardrobe. UpperSuede upper with contrasting lacesHigh-ankle for upper foot protectionLace-up system for snug, customised FitLong leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for a comfortable, abrasion-free wearLeather inner lining of the collar for a comfortable wearStitch detailing for durability and stylePadded fabric footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional lugsshoe careUse a nubuck and suede brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
